channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PARKHOSPS] Park Medi World Ltd. Approves Launch of Hospital in Panchkula and Expansion of Bed Capacity at Grecian Super Speciality Hospital, Mohali
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Park Medi World Ltd. announced the outcomes of its Board Meeting held on March 10, 2026. The company approved the launch of a Multispecialty Hospital in Panchkula, which will commence operations on March 29, 2026. Additionally, the bed capacity of Grecian Super Speciality Hospital, Mohali, a subsidiary of the company, will be expanded by 150 beds. The expansion is expected to be completed in the next 18 months and will be funded from internal accruals of RGS Healthcare Limited.

  • Park Medi World Ltd. approved the launch of a Multispecialty Hospital in Panchkula
  • The Panchkula Hospital will commence operations on March 29, 2026
  • Grecian Super Speciality Hospital, Mohali, a subsidiary of the company, will expand its bed capacity by 150 beds
  • The expansion is expected to be completed in the next 18 months
  • The expansion will be funded from internal accruals of RGS Healthcare Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Park Medi World Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MAPMYINDIA] Tata Mutual Fund Acquires 4.9761% Shares in C.E. Info Systems Ltd via Open Market
item.description:
Tata Mutual Fund has acquired 27,23,000 shares of C.E. Info Systems Ltd through its schemes Tata Small Cap Fund and Tata India Equity Fund Multipartner SICAV. This acquisition was done through the open market and represents 4.9761% of the company's shares. The acquired shares were previously unencumbered.

  • Tata Mutual Fund has acquired 27,23,000 shares of C.E. Info Systems Ltd, representing 4.9761% of the company's shares.
  • The acquisition was done through the open market via Tata Small Cap Fund and Tata India Equity Fund Multipartner SICAV.
  • No encumbrances were present on the acquired shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: C.E. Info Systems Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RKDL] Ravi Kumar Distilleries Ltd: R V Ravikumar Acquires 0.02% Shares on 6th March, 2025
item.description:
Ravi Kumar Distilleries Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from R V Ravikumar & PACs. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of 5440 (0.02%) equity shares of the company on 6th March, 2025 from the open market. The total holding of R V Ravikumar in the company now stands at 22.97%.

  • R V Ravikumar acquires 0.02% shares of Ravi Kumar Distilleries Ltd on 6th March, 2025
  • The acquisition was made from the open market
  • R V Ravikumar's total holding in the company now stands at 22.97%
  • The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
  • The acquisition does not seem to have a significant impact on the company's diluted share/voting capital

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAVI KUMAR DISTILLERIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NISUS] Catalyst Trusteeship Ltd Releases Pledge Over Nisus Finance Services Co Ltd Shares
item.description:
Catalyst Trusteeship Ltd, acting as a security trustee on behalf of Tata Capital Limited and DSP Finance Private Limited, has released a pledge over certain equity shares of Nisus Finance Services Co Limited. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011. The pledge was over 10,00,000 equity shares, which is 4.19% of the total voting rights.

  • Catalyst Trusteeship Ltd releases pledge over Nisus Finance Services Co Ltd shares.
  • 10,00,000 equity shares, which is 4.19% of the total voting rights, were released.
  • The release was made on behalf of Tata Capital Limited and DSP Finance Private Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nisus Finance Services Co Ltd | Category: Pledge

item.title: [LCCINFOTEC] Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel Acquires 24.91% Shares of LCC Infotech Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel has acquired 24.91% shares of LCC Infotech Ltd as per the disclosure under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition details are as follows: Before the acquisition, Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel did not hold any shares in LCC Infotech Ltd. Post-acquisition, he now holds 24.91% shares of the company. The total equity shares of LCC Infotech Ltd before the acquisition were 12,65,93,350 and after the acquisition, it became 16,85,93,350. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition is also 16,85,93,350.

  • Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel acquires 24.91% shares of LCC Infotech Ltd
  • The acquisition was made as per the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • Before the acquisition, Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel did not hold any shares in LCC Infotech Ltd
  • Post-acquisition, Kunjit Maheshbhai Patel now holds 24.91% shares of the company
  • The total equity shares of LCC Infotech Ltd before the acquisition were 12,65,93,350 and after the acquisition, it became 16,85,93,350

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LCC INFOTECH LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TI] Axana Estates LLP Acquires 3.84% Stake in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd
item.description:
Axana Estates LLP, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PACs), has acquired a significant stake in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd. The acquisition was made through equity shares, with Axana Estates LLP acquiring 3.84% and PACs acquiring 1.28%. The total holding of Axana Estates LLP and PACs after the acquisition is 5.14%.

  • Axana Estates LLP acquires 3.84% stake in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd.
  • PACs acquire 1.28% stake in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd.
  • Total holding of Axana Estates LLP and PACs after the acquisition is 5.14%.
  • The acquisition was made through equity shares.
  • The acquisition is in compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TILAKNAGAR INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PARKHOSPS] Park Medi World Ltd. Launches Multispecialty Hospital in Panchkula and Expands Mohali Hospital
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Park Medi World Ltd. has announced the launch of a multispecialty hospital in Panchkula and the expansion of its hospital in Mohali. The Panchkula hospital, with a capacity of 350 beds, will commence operations on March 29, 2026. The Mohali hospital will see an expansion of 150 beds, increasing its capacity to 500 beds. The expansion is expected to be completed in the next 18 months and will be funded internally. The new facilities will strengthen Park Hospital's position as the largest private healthcare network in the Tricity region.

  • Launch of a 350-bedded multispecialty hospital in Panchkula.
  • Expansion of the existing 350-bedded hospital in Mohali by 150 beds.
  • The Panchkula hospital will commence operations on March 29, 2026.
  • The Mohali hospital expansion is expected to be completed in the next 18 months.
  • The expansion will be funded internally.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Park Medi World Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SUDTIND-B] Suditi Industries Ltd: Pawan Agarwal & Others Dispose Equity Shares - Regulation 29(2) Disclosure
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Suditi Industries Ltd. The disclosure pertains to the disposal of equity shares by Mr. Pawan Agarwal and others. The total shares disposed are 2,39,01,545. The disclosure also includes the details of the shares held by promoters and PACs before and after the acquisition.

  • Disposal of equity shares by Mr. Pawan Agarwal and others in Suditi Industries Ltd.
  • Total shares disposed: 2,39,01,545
  • Includes details of shares held by promoters and PACs before and after the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUDITI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [MRO-TEK] Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd Acquires Shares in Umiya Buildcon Ltd: SEBI Disclosure
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd has made a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 for Umiya Buildcon Limited (formerly MRO-TEK Realty Limited). The acquisition details include 71,21,066 shares carrying voting rights, 0 shares in the nature of encumbrance, and 0 warrants/convertible securities. After the acquisition, Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd along with PACs holds 38.12% of the total voting rights.

  • Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd has acquired shares in Umiya Buildcon Limited
  • The acquisition includes 71,21,066 shares carrying voting rights
  • Umiya Holding Pvt Ltd along with PACs now holds 38.12% of the total voting rights
  • The acquisition was made under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • Umiya Buildcon Limited was formerly known as MRO-TEK Realty Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MRO-TEK Realty Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PURSHOTTAM] Artha Shree Pvt Ltd Acquires 9.69% Stake in Purshottam Investofin Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Artha Shree Pvt Ltd has acquired 7,19,335 equity shares of Purshottam Investofin Ltd, representing 9.69% of the paid-up equity share capital. The acquisition was made by Artha Shree Pvt Ltd and Bharat Soni, who together hold 14.76% of the total share/voting capital.

  • Artha Shree Pvt Ltd acquires 9.69% stake in Purshottam Investofin Ltd
  • 7,19,335 equity shares of face value INR 10 each acquired
  • Bharat Soni also part of the acquisition
  • Total holding of Artha Shree Pvt Ltd and Bharat Soni: 14.76%
  • Acquisition amount: INR 7,42,32,950

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Purshottam Investofin Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
